Saloni
Yeh page sirf tumhare liye banaya hai 💖

Kuch cheezein alfazon mein nahi kehte — isliye ek poori duniya bana di. Scroll karo, dekho, aur jaano ki tum kitni khaas ho.

👾 Yeh duniya banai hai Cheenu ne — tumhare liye 💖 🌸
Hamari Kahani 🌸 Mera Letter Padhna 💌
💕🌸✨💖🌸💕

🌸 Hamari Kahani

Chhoti chhoti yaadein, badi badi baatein — sab yahan hain.

Chapter
Ek

Pehli Baar ✨

Jab pehli baar tumse baat hui, toh ek alag hi ehsaas tha. Normal dinon mein kuch khaas hua — tumhari ek smile, ek baat — aur sab badal gaya. Woh moment dil mein aaj bhi taaza hai.

Chapter
Do

Dheere Dheere 🌱

Woh baatein jo raat ko shuru hoti thi aur subah tak khatam nahi hoti thi. Tumhara hasna, tumhare andaaz, tumhara sab kuch notice hone laga. Aur phir ek din samajh aaya ki yeh sirf dosti nahi hai.

Chapter
Teen

Jab Yaqeen Ho Gaya 💖

Ek woh pal tha — chup chup sa, bina shor ke — jab dil ne kaha ki yeh insaan khaas hai. Tumhare hote sab aasaan lagta hai. Duniya thodi aur khubsoorat dikhti hai.

Chapter
Ab

Yeh Waqt, Yeh Pal 🎀

Ab bhi likhna baaki hai. Aage aur bhi moments hain — unplanned, unscripted. Aur har us pal mein tumhara saath chahiye. Bas itna hi maangte hain.

🖼️ Tumhari Zindagi, Hamare Rang

Woh tasveerein jo dil mein utar jaati hain — hamesha ke liye.

⭐
Teri smile meri duniya hai 🌸
🌸
Kuch waqt aise hote hain jo dil mein rehte hain 💖
💫
Tu hai toh sab theek hai ✨
🎀
Har khushi teri wajah se hai 🌷
💖
Teri aankhon mein kho jaata hoon 💫
✨
Best memories wali ladki 🎀
🌷
Jab tu hassti hai, sab roshni ho jaata hai ⭐
💕
Tere saath har pal khaas hai 💕
🌺
Meri pyaari si Saloni 🌸
💝
Tu nahin hoti toh ye zindagi adhuri hoti 💝
🌹
Teri yaadein dil mein basti hain 🌺
💌
Har pal tera intezaar rehta hai 💌
🥰
Jo dil chahta hai, wohi tu hai 🥰
🌸
Sirf teri wajah se muskurata hoon 💖
💫
Tere jaisa koi nahi is duniya mein 🌹
🎀
Apna sa lagta hai tera har andaaz 💫
⭐
Teri khushi meri khushi hai 🎀
💖
Dil ki baat tu hi samajhti hai 💕

💌 Dil Ki Baat

Yeh woh cheezein hain jo aksar kehne ki himmat nahi hoti.

💌
Meri Pyaari Saloni,

Yeh page banaya toh isliye tha ki kuch baatein hain jo words mein nahi aatein — ya phir jo ek message mein fit nahi hotein. Toh ek poori duniya bana di, sirf tumhare liye.

Tum shayad yeh nahi jaanti ki tumhara hona kitna khaas feel karta hai. Teri hasi, teri aankhein, tera woh andaaz jab tum kuch interesting baat karte ho — sab kuch notice hota hai. Sab kuch yaad rehta hai.

Jinke paas tum hote ho, woh log bahut lucky hain — aur main yeh pura yakeen se kehta hoon. Tum logon ko comfortable feel karate ho bina koshish kiye. Yeh cheez har kisi mein nahi hoti.

Jo din mein tumse baat hoti hai, woh din thoda zyada acha lagta hai. Jo din nahi hoti, woh thoda khali khali lagta hai. Yeh mere liye chhoti baat nahi — yeh bahut badi baat hai.

Toh yeh letter koi grand declaration nahi hai. Yeh sirf ek sachchi baat hai — ki tum meri zindagi mein hoke acha kiya. Bahut acha kiya. Aur chahta hoon ki tum yeh jaano.

Aage bhi baatein honi chahiye. Lambi, bewakoofana, raat tak chalti rahe wali baatein. Aur kuch moments jo abhi tak sooche bhi nahi — woh sab tumhare saath banana chahta hoon.

👾
Tumhara,
Cheenu  aka Space Alien 👾

P.S. — Agar kisi bure din yeh page khola hai, toh yahan thodi der ruko. Yeh page ek achhe din likha gaya tha — sirf tumhare liye. 🌸

⏳ Hamare Saath Ka Waqt

20 December 2021 se aaj tak — yeh sab tera mera tha 💕

Jab se hamari kahani shuru hui

📅 20 December 2021
00Saal
00Mahine
00Din
00Ghante
00Minute
00Second
Itne din... aur main abhi bhi smile karta hoon 🌸
Har ek second qeemti tha. Har ek din khaas tha. Aur agar tum saath ho, toh aage bhi yehi rahega.

🌟 Dil Ki Duaayein

Jo dil ne chahaa, jo aankhon ne dekha — sab yahan likh diya 💌
